'''Kryss P'teska''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] orphan rescued by [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] after the [[Battle of Ylesia]]. He was later dropped off on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] with the other rescued children.<ref name="Rebel Dawn" />
